task: Build amotive.io v2 refined pages with subtle interactive 3D

designRules.style: Match website-v2.html EXACTLY — same structure, same JS, same CSS patterns
designRules.3d: Subtle interactive only: button hover lift, card tilt on mousemove, scroll reveal with depth. NO Three.js. NO floating wireframes.

designRules.responsive: Mobile-friendly, disable tilt on touch devices
designRules.fonts: Georgia serif headings 900 weight, system sans body
designRules.allInline: ALL CSS and JS inline in single file, no external dependencies
